'''Squeaky''' was a [[Protocol droid/Legends|protocol droid]] with a patchwork appearance, consisting of silver and gold plating.

He served under [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Raymus Antilles/Legends|Raymus Antilles]] on the [[Tantive IV/Legends|''Tantive IV'']] in [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]]. When that vessel was captured over [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]], he was taken prisoner by [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] and sent to the [[Glitterstim/Legends|glitterstim]] mines of [[Kessel/Legends|Kessel]]. There, he managed to hijack a [[Starship/Legends|starship]], along with a group of other [[Droid/Legends|droids]].

Squeaky could not [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] a ship, so he programmed the auto-pilot to do terrain-following mode for a few miles, then flee. He was not aware of how uneven Kessel's terrain was, and was as a result surprised to find his escape route took his group on a wild ride through Kessel's twisting canyons. After the escaped droids left the planet and dispersed through [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]], the incident was immortalized throughout [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] as the "[[Runaway Droid Ride]]."

Eventually, the intelligence he displayed on Kessel led to his being [[Manumission/Legends|manumitted]], allowing him to live his life without a master or a [[Restraining bolt/Legends|restraining bolt]]. Eventually, he joined the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]], where he became an [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wing]] ground control officer, and a waiter at the [[DownTime|Downtime]] [[Cantina/Legends|cantina]]. Later, he became the quartermaster for [[Wraith Squadron]].

Squeaky was a bad-tempered droid, with [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]] noting that he was more verbally abusive than any other droid he had met. He was known to insult customers at the Downtime, and argue incessantly with [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]] when he accompanied him on missions.
